MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Eric Roussel is present.
Jonathan H. Bornstein representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Engelbert Holder is present.
Alexander Pugh representing the defendant through limited scope.

(Default entered against defendant Saboo Hiroshi Takaki on 4/6/09).

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
